title: Healthcare Quality Associate
description: Eli Lilly is seeking a Healthcare Quality Associate to support quality assurance and compliance initiatives in our Atlanta operations. You'll monitor quality metrics, conduct audits, and work to ensure our pharmaceutical manufacturing meets the highest standards. This hybrid role combines regulatory compliance with operational improvement.
responsibilities: Monitor healthcare quality metrics and performance indicators; track compliance with regulatory standards
Conduct internal audits and inspections to identify areas for improvement
Document findings and recommend corrective actions; track implementation and effectiveness
Support regulatory compliance and documentation requirements; prepare audit responses
Collaborate with operations and quality teams to identify and prevent quality issues

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Healthcare Administration, Life Sciences, or related field
